welcome.name: Welcome, I am Ulternae
welcome.description: I have 2 years of experience as a Frontend Web Developer from Zipaquirá, Colombia, specializing in responsive designs with great attention to detail.

2023.description: Development of a series of applications in Retool to simplify problem resolution by technical support, fixing bugs in the main application, generating translations, creating pages based on designs provided by clients, and developing components for the evolution of the application using NextJS.

2025.description: Participated in the development of a template editor for generating custom reports, implemented advanced data filtering systems, and developed a task management center similar to tools like ClickUp. Additionally, I took on a technical leadership role in building an MVP for a SaaS CRM platform focused on the construction sector.

zicons.title: ZIcons
zicons.content: Platform created to demonstrate in-depth knowledge of authentication (2FA, recovery codes), payment methods with Stripe, and visualization and copying of both paid and free icons. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, SQLite, and Turso.

chat.title: KC Chat Real Time
chat.content: Free platform where you can register and have a unique profile to chat with friends, create groups, assign moderators, and connect with many people. Created from scratch with React, Tailwind CSS, Node, SQLite, and Turso.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro
pomodoro.content: App designed to improve time management using the Pomodoro technique: 25 minutes of work followed by a break. Created with React and Tailwind; design provided by FrontendMentor.

shopi.title: Shopi
shopi.content: Ecommerce developed to simulate the real purchase flow of a store, featuring: purchase history, authentication, product retrieval, among other features. Created with React and Tailwind, using React Router for navigation.

reactTodo.title: React Todo
reactTodo.content: Application created to manage tasks where you can add, edit, and delete tasks, as well as create and customize your own profile. Created with React and CSS.

aboutMe.name: About Me
aboutMe.description:
I am Jhonatan David Castillo, known as Ulternae, a self-taught frontend developer with experience building modern, secure, and scalable web products.
I mainly work with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Redux, Zustand, and Tailwind, complementing my stack with Node/Express, SQL databases, secure authentication, and payments with Stripe.
I am interested in creating clear user experiences with maintainable architecture and a focus on results. I also apply generative AI and Prompt Engineering to accelerate development and design processes.
I am currently looking for projects where I can contribute product vision, technical execution, and continuous frontend evolution.
